title: Red Hat Security Advisory: Satellite 6.18.1 Async Update
overview:
A new release is now available for Red Hat Satellite 6.18 for RHEL 9.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact
of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score,
which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability
from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: Satellite 6.18.1 Async Update

A new release is now available for Red Hat Satellite 6.18 for RHEL 9.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact
of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score,
which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability
from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

A new release is now available for Red Hat Satellite 6.18 for RHEL 9.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact
of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score,
which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability
from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
foreman-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.src.rpm
rubygem-katello-4.18.0.4-1.el9sat.src.rpm
satellite-6.18.1-1.el9sat.src.rpm
foreman-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
foreman-cli-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
foreman-debug-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
foreman-dynflow-sidekiq-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
foreman-ec2-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
foreman-journald-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
foreman-libvirt-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
foreman-openstack-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
foreman-pcp-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
foreman-postgresql-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
foreman-redis-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
foreman-service-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
foreman-telemetry-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
foreman-vmware-3.16.0.7-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
rubygem-katello-4.18.0.4-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
satellite-6.18.1-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
satellite-cli-6.18.1-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
satellite-common-6.18.1-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
satellite-obsolete-packages-6.18.1-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm
satellite-capsule-6.18.1-1.el9sat.noarch.rpm

CVE-2025-9572: n authorization flaw in Foreman's GraphQL API allows low-privileged users to access metadata beyond their assigned permissions. Unlike the REST API, which correctly enforces access controls, the GraphQL endpoint does not apply proper filtering, leading to an authorization bypass.
